---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem you're solving

Describe the real-world situation where you hit a limitation. Focus on the **why**, not the solution.

> e.g. "When I have 50+ models that all depend on the same staging table, I have no way to rebuild just a single downstream subtree without rebuilding everything."

## Proposed solution

How you'd like this to work. Include example commands, config, or SQL where it helps.

## Alternatives you've considered

What workarounds you currently use, or other approaches you considered.

## Warehouse / dialect relevance

Is this specific to a warehouse? Does it affect all dialects equally?

## Additional context

Links to related issues, external documentation, or prior art in dbt/SQLMesh that informs this request.
